channel.title: NAJD Hamadani, MI Hasan, AJ Baldi, SJ Hossain, S Shiraji, MSA Bhuiyan, SF Mehrin, J Fisher, F Tofail, SMMU Tipu, S Grantham-McGregor, BA Biggs, S Braat, SR Pasricha | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAJD Hamadani, MI Hasan, AJ Baldi, SJ Hossain, S Shiraji, MSA Bhuiyan, SF Mehrin, J Fisher, F Tofail, SMMU Tipu, S Grantham-McGregor, BA Biggs, S Braat, SR Pasricha

image.title: NAJD Hamadani, MI Hasan, AJ Baldi, SJ Hossain, S Shiraji, MSA Bhuiyan, SF Mehrin, J Fisher, F Tofail, SMMU Tipu, S Grantham-McGregor, BA Biggs, S Braat, SR Pasricha

item.title: Immediate impact of stay-at-home orders to control COVID-19 transmission on socioeconomic conditions, food insecurity, mental health, and intimate partner violence in Bangladeshi women and their families: an interrupted time series.
